Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Brian Junginger, McInerney & Dillon, 510-465-7100 for Plaintiff and moving party
David M. Wiseblood, 415-547-2700 for Defendant
The Court hears argument. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument, Plaintiffs' Motion for Preliminary injunction Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order, is taken under submission. Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare an order adopting the tentative ruling. Counsel for defendant is to prepare an order opposing the tentative ruling. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: R. Goulding; Dept.501; Not Reported
